sentences.english: Do you think students should be required to wear uniforms?
I think school uniforms have more advantages than disadvantages.
sentences.korean: 교복이 단점보다 장점이 더 많다고 생각해요.

sentences.english: First they eliminate the social pressure that comes from comparing clothes and brands.
sentences.korean: 첫째 옷과 브랜드를 비교하는 데서 오는 사회적 압박을 없애줘요.

sentences.english: Students from less wealthy families don't have to feel embarrassed about what they wear.
sentences.korean: 덜 부유한 가정의 학생들이 자신의 옷차림에 대해 부끄러워할 필요가 없어요.

sentences.english: Second uniforms simplify the morning routine — you never have to waste time deciding what to wear.
sentences.korean: 둘째 교복은 아침 루틴을 단순화해요 — 뭘 입을지 결정하는 데 시간을 낭비할 필요가 없어요.

sentences.english: While some argue that uniforms limit self-expression I believe students can express their individuality in many other ways beyond clothing.
sentences.korean: 교복이 자기표현을 제한한다는 주장이 있지만 학생은 옷 외에도 다양한 방식으로 개성을 표현할 수 있다고 생각해요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
